hero.heading: Bouncy Castle & Inflatable Rentals in Bridgewater, NS
hero.subheading: Based in Bridgewater, serving the South Shore and Nova Scotia, with larger events and selected bookings available across the Maritimes / Atlantic Canada. Travel quoted separately.

intro.heading: Premium inflatable rentals for unforgettable events.
intro.text: Nova Kingdom Rentals brings premium bouncy castle rentals and inflatable rentals to backyard birthdays, school events, community events, and summer celebrations. We are based in Bridgewater, serving the South Shore and Nova Scotia, with larger events and selected bookings available across the Maritimes / Atlantic Canada. Travel quoted separately.

categories.title: Lawn Games
categories.text: Easy add-ons for birthdays, schools, and community events.

howItWorks.title: Choose your fun
howItWorks.text: Pick a rental or package that fits your event.

howItWorks.title: Send date and address
howItWorks.text: Share the details so availability and travel can be checked.

howItWorks.title: We confirm and deliver
howItWorks.text: Booking is confirmed after availability, setup suitability, travel, and deposit details are reviewed.
